name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: A themed Windows ChatGPT companion for Codex that preserves precious Codex usage and creates detailed return-to-Codex handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Preserve Codex usage and hand completed work back
interface.longDescription: Sidecar is a native Windows companion app that pins beside the exact Codex desktop window, hosts a persistent ChatGPT session, gathers bounded local Codex and repository context, offloads planning and debugging, and then generates a detailed prompt that can be copied back into Codex for implementation.
defaultPrompt: Explain how Sidecar preserves Codex usage and creates a return-to-Codex handoff.
